title: pilosella echioides subsp. macrocyma
intro: Pilosella echioides subsp. macrocyma, also known as the rough hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its hairy stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pilosella echioides subsp. macrocyma include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
